## What does this PR do?

One sentence summary.

## Why?

What problem does it solve or what feature does it add?

## How to test

Steps to verify this works.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Types check (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Changeset added for release-worthy changes (`pnpm changeset`) or PR is clearly marked internal-only
- [ ] Coverage meets 90% threshold
- [ ] No dead code (`pnpm knip:check`)
- [ ] One concern per PR — no unrelated changes
- [ ] README Feature Tracker updated (if new feature)
- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior changed — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#documentation-policy))
- [ ] No generated `dist/` or `coverage/` output is committed

## AI-assisted?

If you used AI tools, note which parts were AI-assisted and summarize the intent in your own words.
Do not paste raw model transcripts or ship AI-generated changes without reviewing tests, hooks, and release impact.
